'''鈭歬-sh-sh-l''' ('''kakasheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:illegalize|illegalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:illegalize|illegalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-sh-sh-l
|-
! Lemma
| kakasheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikasheloko|thikasheloko]] || [[word:jikasheloko|jikasheloko]] || [[word:shikasheloko|shikasheloko]] || [[word:kikasheloko|kikasheloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukasheloko|thuthukasheloko]] || [[word:jujukasheloko|jujukasheloko]] || [[word:shushukasheloko|shushukasheloko]] || [[word:kukukasheloko|kukukasheloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kasheloko|th忙kasheloko]] || [[word:j忙kasheloko|j忙kasheloko]] || [[word:sh忙kasheloko|sh忙kasheloko]] || [[word:k忙kasheloko|k忙kasheloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
